title: Big Globe x Cold Sweat
description: A simple data pack that configures the Cold Sweat mod to better work with Big Globe's expanded world height, overhauled biomes, and unique blocks.
body:
A simple data pack that configures the Cold Sweat mod to better work with Big Globe's expanded world height, overhauled biomes, and unique blocks.

Specifically, this datapack increases the altitude based temperature system to function logically both above ground and below, making the core very hot, and mountain tops rather cold. It also makes the added soul blocks (magma and lava) cold, as well as the molten rock blocks increasingly hot, and smooths the transitions in temperature between adjacent biomes.

Note that since Big Globe is only on fabric and Cold Sweat is on Forge / NeoForge, you will need to use something like Sinytra Connector to play the two together.
